author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: bmm_differentiable forward now calls the GPU-aware bmm() (cuBLAS on GPU, CPU loops otherwise) and attaches BmmBackward. Backward uses batch_transpose + bmm under no_grad — same pattern as PyTorch. batch_transpose uses data_vec() for device-transparent access and to() to restore the result to the original device. All 574 core tests pass.
